circular_title: GST Advisory: New Invoice Management System (IMS) - April 2026
circular_summary: Invoice Management System mandatory from April 1, 2026 for all GST filers.
actions: Review supplier-uploaded invoices within the IMS workflow before auto-population into GSTR-2B and take necessary actions (accept, reject, or keep pending) for Arvind Textiles Pvt. Ltd.
Reconcile purchase register with IMS actions to ensure accurate reflection of eligible input tax credit in GSTR-3B for Arvind Textiles Pvt. Ltd.
Ensure vendor follow-up happens before filing GSTR-3B to match the claim of input tax credit with accepted invoice data for Arvind Textiles Pvt. Ltd.
email_subject: Compliance Advisory: GST Advisory: New Invoice Management System (IMS) - April 2026
email_body:
{
  "subject": "GST Advisory: New Invoice Management System (IMS) - April 2026",
  "body": "Dear Arvind Shah, 

As a manufacturing and export entity, Arvind Textiles Pvt. Ltd. is required to comply with the new Invoice Management System (IMS) regulations under GST. This applies to your company specifically as it involves the management of supplier-uploaded invoices and input tax credit claims.

To ensure compliance, please take the following actions:
1. Review supplier-uploaded invoices within the IMS workflow before auto-population into GSTR-2B and take necessary actions (accept, reject, or keep pending) for Arvind Textiles Pvt. Ltd.
2. Reconcile purchase register with IMS actions to ensure accurate reflection of eligible input tax credit in GSTR-3B for Arvind Textiles Pvt. Ltd.
3. Ensure vendor follow-up happens before filing GSTR-3B to match the claim of input tax credit with accepted invoice data for Arvind Textiles Pvt. Ltd.

The deadline for compliance is 2026-04-20. Although the penalty for non-compliance is not specified, it is essential to adhere to the deadline to avoid any potential risks.

Please do not hesitate to contact us if you require any assistance with the implementation of these actions.

Best regards,
Compliance Advisory Team"
}
internal_notes: CA notes — deadline was estimated based on GSTR-3B filing cycle, cross-checks needed for accurate input tax credit reflection
